src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/backend.general_idea: Replace deprecated ObjectMapper constructor with JsonMapper builder pattern for Jackson 2.16+ compatibility.
src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/backend.why_exists: ObjectMapper() constructor is deprecated in recent Jackson versions and may be removed; using the builder is the required modern approach.

src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/backend.general_idea: Update field type from ObjectMapper to JsonMapper to match the new instantiation strategy.
Remove manual parent restoration logic now that Jackson annotations handle bidirectional references.
src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/backend.after: // restoreParents(newRoot); // not necessary anymore thanks to @JsonManagedReference/@JsonBackReference, instead of @JsonIgnore

src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/backend.general_idea: Comment out the restoreParents utility method as it is no longer used.
Remove commented-out legacy code block for adding sub-nodes.

src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/entitie.general_idea: Add Jackson annotation to manage bidirectional reference serialization for the children list.
Replace @JsonIgnore with @JsonBackReference to handle bidirectional parent-child serialization correctly.
Add missing import for JsonBackReference annotation used in the class.
Move @JsonIgnore annotation from changeListeners to certificateHandling field to ensure correct JSON serialization behavior.
Update @SuppressWarnings annotation from 'deprecation' to 'removal' to align with Java 21 compiler warnings for the finalize method.
